name: Chidera Okonkwo
achievement: Scored 312 in JAMB — Admitted to UNILAG for Medicine & Surgery
story: Chidera prepared for JAMB for 6 months using Big Quams Media CBT practice and free past questions. Despite having no access to a lesson teacher, he scored 312 and got his first choice — Medicine & Surgery at the University of Lagos. He credits consistent practice and the BQM scholarship guides for keeping him focused.

name: Fatima Abubakar
achievement: Won the MTN Foundation Scholarship — Studies Engineering at ABU
story: Fatima applied for the MTN Foundation Scholarship after seeing it listed on Big Quams Media. She followed the step-by-step guide on the platform, submitted a strong application, and was selected from over 5,000 applicants. She now studies Electrical Engineering at Ahmadu Bello University, Zaria, fully funded.

name: Emeka Nwosu
achievement: NELFUND Loan Approved — First in His Family to Attend University
story: Emeka's family could not afford his university fees at UNIBEN. After discovering the NELFUND student loan guide on Big Quams Media, he applied and got approved within 3 weeks. He is now in his second year studying Computer Science, with his fees fully covered by the federal loan.
